global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with various shapes and text elements promoting a travel service.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel app for booking hotels and flights easily.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A large rectangular shape in the center with a subtle shadow effect.

elements.label: Central oval shape
elements.description: An oval shape positioned centrally, slightly overlapping the rectangular shape.

elements.label: Additional rectangular shape
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape that adds depth, positioned slightly above the main rectangular shape.

elements.label: Top logo element
elements.description: A small logo or icon located at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Small circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Unidentified element
elements.description: A small rectangular shape that is not clearly defined in its purpose.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold text at the top of the ad that reads 'NomadLaye' in a large, eye-catching font.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Text below the headline that reads 'Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap' in a smaller font.
elements.text_content: Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center of the ad that says 'Shop now' in a clear, inviting font.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is positioned at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
